sous_titres.text: 911, what's your emergency? Are you there?
Okay, calm down. Where are you? What's your address?
Okay. Can you tell me what street you're on?
We went into the house. We found people.
You found who, Jordan? Who did you find?
When did you do all this?
When you were with the girls. I thought you'd like it.
You can have this room. I'm gonna get set up out there.
Yeah, I don't know about the tub.
Didn't know if the roses go in first or after.
Mike, it's me. We're at the house now.
I... I know you're fucking drunk, maybe you're asleep now, but...
I'll tell you when I see you, but things...
They didn't work out the way I planned at all.
I'm going to need you to come out here and get me.
Just whenever you wake up in the morning. I'm going to give her the car.
Just call me when you get this, okay?
I know it's a bitch to come all the way out here
I only wanted to dance with you.
You're a jerk. You're a jerk.
Oh, it's freezing. Let's get in the car.
I just want to tell you something.
What do you wanna tell me?
I remember the first time I ever saw you.
It's really nice, everything you did.
I can't keep it. I can't take it back.
Your clothes are in the bedroom, if you want.
You know, I only get to wear it tonight. It makes me feel pretty.
I'm so sorry it wasn't the way you thought it would be.
Well, what do we do now?
What is it, like, 4:00 in the morning?
No. No, you got the wrong house.
You know, people get lost out here. Should I go get her?
She seemed okay. I mean, I think she would've said if she wasn't.
I'll go get you some more.
I didn't mean that. You don't have to.
I'll just go to sleep. I'm tired, anyway.
It's all right, I want to drive for a while, anyway.
Let me light you a fire.
I was thinking when you were taking a bath.
I want you to take the car back tomorrow.
I don't think a road trip's a good idea right now.
I called Mike. He's gonna come out and get me in the morning.
Are you sure that's what you want?
If you want, we can talk some more.
Thanks for lighting me a fire.
That girl, I mean, she keeps knocking on the door.
What do you mean? I heard her voice.
No, I didn't open the door.
The battery is dead. I'm charging it right now.
I just want you to come home, okay?
No, I'm fine, but just, you know, hurry.
Will you just stay on the phone with me?
This isn't happening. This isn't happening.
What are you doing? What? There's something...
They'll hear you. Stop, stop, stop.
Come here, come here. Sit down. Sit down, sit down, sit down.
How do you know there's somebody out there?
I saw a man at the back door. He's wearing a mask.
What do you mean? Like a ski mask? What?
I don't know. A fucking mask!
I don't know. Okay, okay. Calm down.
Don't go out there. Please, don't go.
So, what do you wanna do?
You want me to go talk to her?
People just don't stand out there staring at us like that.
I left my phone in the car, I'm gonna go get it.
One of them came in here and took my phone.
All right, get the fuck out of here!
Jesus Christ, what are you doing?
I'm sorry. I'm waiting for you.
I want you to get your things. Put your shoes on.
No, I told you, they took my phone.
Babe, I put it in your bag.
James, it's not in the bag.
I plugged it into the wall, and when I came back it was gone.
It's just, I don't understand. We checked the whole house,
Since we've been here I haven't heard a dog bark,
Kristen, I don't want you to think about that, okay?
Don't think about it. Doesn't matter right now.
We don't need a reason if they come through that door.
We gotta get out of here.
Does your dad have a gun?
There was one here when I was a kid. He always hid it.
Stop. I got them, I got them.
I don't know how to use this thing.
I'm not sure I even know how to load it.
But you said you used to hunt with your dad.
No, I never did. It was just something that I said.
When I open the door, I just want you to run, okay?
Block the door, block the door.
We're not gonna fucking die here.
We're gonna sit here, we're gonna wait for the fucking cops to come, or whatever,
but we're not gonna fucking die.
Yo, Jimmy James. What's up, buddy?
It's Mike. Listen, man, I'm outside. I got here early.
I just decided to come out, and you know,
just be here for you as soon as I possibly could,
because you know how I like to wait on you hand and fucking foot.
Why didn't he have a fucking mask?
What do you mean, he didn't have a mask?
Get off of me. Stop it.
He was my best friend. He's my best friend.
He was my best friend. What am I gonna do?
I'm gonna go outside. I want you to hide somewhere.
There's an old radio at the barn, I'm gonna try and call for help.
I don't know what else to do.
It's okay, I'm gonna come right back for you.
Listen, I want you to go, and I want you to hide there.
I'll keep them away. I'll come find you.
James, no. I want to come with you.
Kristen, please, it'll be okay, I promise.
Why are you doing this to us?
Why are you doing this to us?
You don't have to do this. Please!
You can stop now. You... Please! No!
You can stop now. You don't have to do this.
